_note: Recomputed portal display numbers from in-repo raw data. Each entry: value (recomputed), shipped (in json), how_derived, source_file, verdict.

coverage.de_rows_total.how_derived: row count of DE_stats.suppl_table.csv (one row per target×condition)

coverage.genome_total_targets.how_derived: unique target_contrast (Ensembl ID) count in DE_stats.suppl_table.csv

coverage.targets_in_portal.how_derived: unique gene count in real-dataset.json targets[] (grade>=2 UNION advance/watchlist selection over the full screen)

coverage.gnomad_constraint_genes.how_derived: count of DE target Ensembl IDs (DE_stats.target_contrast) present in gnomad_constraint_seed.csv ensembl_id

coverage.deep_external_evidence_genes.how_derived: count of *.json files in the per-gene evidence cache directory (mirrors export_real_data.py's evidence_genes enumeration)

coverage.measured_downstream_genes.how_derived: h5ad var (measured-gene) axis dimension. In-repo gate-passing signed-DE table contains 10271 unique significant downstream genes; the full-signed table has 10,273. The exact 10,282 is the S3-only GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad var dimension.
coverage.measured_downstream_genes.reason: var dimension of the S3-only single-cell h5ad; in-repo CSVs expose 10,271-10,273 unique downstream genes, not 10,282.

concept_layer.count.how_derived: length of real-dataset.json modules[] (M01-M20 concept layer)

risk_tier.clear.how_derived: client-side deriveRiskTier (exprCompare.ts) applied to real-dataset.json targets[]: f = #redFlags + #safetyLiabilities + (gnomad.constraintTier=='high'); f>=3 avoid / 2 high / 1 caution / 0 clear

risk_tier.caution.how_derived: client-side deriveRiskTier (exprCompare.ts) applied to real-dataset.json targets[]: f = #redFlags + #safetyLiabilities + (gnomad.constraintTier=='high'); f>=3 avoid / 2 high / 1 caution / 0 clear

risk_tier.high.how_derived: client-side deriveRiskTier (exprCompare.ts) applied to real-dataset.json targets[]: f = #redFlags + #safetyLiabilities + (gnomad.constraintTier=='high'); f>=3 avoid / 2 high / 1 caution / 0 clear

risk_tier.avoid.how_derived: client-side deriveRiskTier (exprCompare.ts) applied to real-dataset.json targets[]: f = #redFlags + #safetyLiabilities + (gnomad.constraintTier=='high'); f>=3 avoid / 2 high / 1 caution / 0 clear

validation.calibration.neg_control_grade.how_derived: percent of kd_status=='not_measurable' target-card rows with statistical_evidence_grade==1 (n=4774)

validation.calibration.neg_control_advan.how_derived: percent of kd_status=='not_measurable' rows with readiness_call=='advance' (n=4774)

validation.calibration.ranking_auroc.how_derived: ranking benchmark AUROC (13 canonical positives vs 1,211; Mann-Whitney). run_all_validation.py records it as 'documented (not recomputed here)'; no benchmark engine + labelled positive/negative input set ships in-repo.
validation.calibration.ranking_auroc.reason: AUROC needs the labelled canonical-positive benchmark engine; only the documented value is in-repo, not a runnable recipe.

external.opentargets.symbol_match.how_derived: rows with a resolved Ensembl ID / total rows in track_a_opentargets_revalidation.csv

external.opentargets.named_disease_ga.how_derived: rows whose status == 'OK (exact disease-name GA match)' in track_a_opentargets_revalidation.csv

external.string.VAV1.how_derived: string_n@700 for VAV1 in track_b_string_revalidation.csv (STRING v12 interaction_partners, required_score>=700)

external.string.CD3E.how_derived: string_n@700 for CD3E in track_b_string_revalidation.csv (STRING v12 interaction_partners, required_score>=700)

external.string.PLCG1.how_derived: string_n@700 for PLCG1 in track_b_string_revalidation.csv (STRING v12 interaction_partners, required_score>=700)

external.string.BCL10.how_derived: string_n@700 for BCL10 in track_b_string_revalidation.csv (STRING v12 interaction_partners, required_score>=700)

external.string.STAT3.how_derived: string_n@700 for STAT3 in track_b_string_revalidation.csv (STRING v12 interaction_partners, required_score>=700)

external.string.exact_match.how_derived: count of exact_match==True rows / total in track_b_string_revalidation.csv

external.geo.gse318876.how_derived: GSE318876 target-evidence table exists (1235 rows) and EXTERNAL_REVALIDATION.json track_c verdict starts with REAL (accession + description). Live GEO fetch is network-gated; the in-repo cache is the reproducibility surface.
